name: Anchor
tagline: Provenance-first RAG that refuses to hallucinate.
description: Cosine-floor retrieval that returns chunks when similarity is high, refuses when it isn't. Postgres + pgvector + Next.js. Live playground at anchor-iota-ten.vercel.app/playground.

name: Tripwire
tagline: Mid-stream LLM safety. Catch the lie before the user finishes reading it.
description: Pattern engine that watches LLM streams token-by-token, aborts on rule trip. Sub-millisecond decision latency.

name: Goldset
tagline: Golden datasets + LLM-as-judge + structural assertions, as a GitHub Action.
description: Three eval runners (golden, judge, structural). PR comment with delta + structural assertions block merge on regression.

name: Quickdraw
tagline: Benchmark LLM streaming. TTFT, TPS, $/1K tokens.
description: CLI that runs prompt sets against models, captures TTFT + tokens/sec, diffs against baseline. Nightly bench wired.

name: Stackup
tagline: Production Kubernetes locally in 10 minutes. ArgoCD + Argo Rollouts + Grafana.
description: make up bootstraps a kind cluster with ArgoCD, Argo Rollouts, and Grafana/Prometheus. For learning real k8s without a cloud bill.

name: Codecraft
tagline: Real Node.js in your browser. Monaco + WebContainers + Ollama.
description: In-browser IDE with WebContainers running a real Node process, Monaco for editing, local Ollama for AI completions.
